description: A sales development representative checks in with a high-potential user halfway through their trial period.

nodes.task_description: Identify a trial user who has shown high engagement (e.g., invited team members, created projects).

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a promising trial user.

nodes.task_description: Send a personalized email to the user, offering assistance and asking if they have any questions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent initiates a proactive, helpful conversation.

nodes.task_description: Based on the user's response, schedule a brief call to provide tips or answer questions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent nurtures the lead and increases the likelihood of conversion.
